allow: Bash(node -e "const {sampleData} = require\('./src/data/sampleData.js'\); const depts = [...new Set\(sampleData.revenue.map\(r => r.department\)\)]; console.log\('Departments:', depts\); console.log\('Revenue rows:', sampleData.revenue.length\); console.log\('First row keys:', Object.keys\(sampleData.revenue[0]\)\);")
